title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Invariant Triage
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace rotations while preserving binary-search order and reconnecting every affected link.
Maintain AVL heights and select single or double rotations from imbalance shape.
Use red-black color properties to bound height and guide update repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
